description_long: This is a cylindrical cup with a slightly irregular rim and a handle attached to one side. The exterior surface features a vivid, full-wrap printed image depicting several human figures in a rocky, outdoor landscape under an orange sky, reminiscent of a famous album cover. The cup's body appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, with a matte white interior and a colorful, glossy exterior print. The handle is broad and slightly curved, though it appears somewhat deformed or incomplete. The cup's surface shows some roughness and imperfections, especially around the rim and handle. There are no visible logos, text, or branding, but the decorative artwork is prominent and covers most of the outer surface.
description: A white ceramic cup with a broad handle and a full-wrap, colorful printed image of human figures in a rocky landscape under an orange sky. The cup has a slightly rough, irregular rim and a matte interior.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's handle on the right and the printed image of a blonde figure in the foreground against an orange sky.
description_view_1: The handle is more prominent on the left, and the main focus is on the back of the blonde figure, with more of the rocky landscape visible.
description_view_2: The handle is mostly out of sight, and the image shows several figures scattered across the rocky terrain, with the orange sky above.
description_view_3: The handle is not visible, and the view highlights the figures in motion on the rocks, with the orange sky fading to the left.
